# config_v2

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: File-based JSONC config system (v2). Umbrella for store, merge, and codegen sub-plugins.
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`store`** — ConfigStore abstraction and JSONC-on-disk backend. Reads/writes formatted JSONC files with atomic writes and file-watching.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
